lanes.name: fidelity-audit-gates
lanes.objective: Add deterministic fidelity audit gates that prove XML-to-generated-UI completeness with measurable reports.
deliverables: Add fidelity audit module/report schema that compares XML inventory vs generated UI inventory per screen
Emit explicit missing-node and attribute-position/style coverage risk fields that can fail strict verification
Expose fidelity audit in user-facing execution flow (new command or migrate-e2e integration) without breaking existing commands
Add tests for pass/fail fidelity audit scenarios and deterministic report serialization

lanes.name: event-wiring-coverage
lanes.objective: Expand generated UI event wiring coverage and produce deterministic unsupported-event inventory for migration risk tracking.
deliverables: Extend runtime wiring event mapping policy beyond current minimal supported on* attributes
Preserve deterministic duplicate-safe handler naming and import/use contracts in generated TSX
Emit unsupported event inventory warnings in structured report fields for regression visibility
Add tests validating additional event prop bindings and unsupported-event reporting behavior

lanes.name: transaction-adapter-contract
lanes.objective: Replace transaction placeholder actions with generated API adapter contracts so behavior migration completion can be verified.
deliverables: Define deterministic generated adapter contract for transaction actions (request/response/error envelope hooks)
Update behavior store/action generation to call adapter contracts instead of TODO-only stubs
Ensure generated artifacts remain deterministic and backward-compatible with existing runtime wiring
Add tests for transaction action generation, adapter hook contracts, and failure-path scaffolding
